text: I DISLIKE THEIR CANDIDATE FOR PRES./AE/NO

More for unions whose people are dis honest, have high paying jobs that has less productivity for America. Should not have bailed out GM. Let them go bankrupt and reorganize like is supposed to happen when a company fails...
Need to be more bipartisan
Tend to do more for people as a whole Cut waste, spending to balance budget Help in other parts of the world to eliminate dictators who kill their own people
I feel they work harder for me and this country
I just dont have any faith there
THAT THEY ARE TRYING TO DO SOME TO THE ECONONMY
they need to learn how to counter limbaugh and hannity and miller and other sick warped right wing radio hosts.
they claim to be the working mans party
they hate poor folks and side with money hungry scum bags..
they claim to be for freedom (what a joke) and if they uphold the constitution that would be good!! but i dont think they do. so no...
They are too liberal with taxpayers money when it comes to government assistance for illegal aliens and those that don't have any desire to work and feel that everyone else owes them something.
They are for the middle class
They try to set budgets and keep to them.

Going back to the question, I just think that the Republican Party starts at the top and say they are going everything and turn around and do the opposite. They take care of the high income people, take care of the people that make more money than the ones that are middle class and lower class.
They aren't all tax & spend-tax and spend. (MS) The obvious that's all. (AO) No.

They will probably bring about more regulations, more government. (AE) Bad track record--gotten us into (2) wars that they didn't intend to win. (AE) They do for the people instead of having the people do for themselves. (AE) No.
They finally got their act together. They have a broader focus on what the people want. (AE) No, pro choice.
Against choice in abortion. Don't like choice in schools. I think they have alienated labor rather than working with them. (AE) No.
They are for less government. They are less likely to get into a war we can't win. (AE) No.
